title: csi.exe
html:
csi.exe

Command line interface included with Visual Studio.

Execute

Local execution of unsigned C# code.

csi.exe {PATH:.cs}

Use csi.exe to run unsigned C# code. — MITRE: T1127 — Privileges: User
